# Exit Plan

**Purpose:** Clear plan for ending the vendor relationship and transferring full ownership  
**Audience:** Client Executive Team, Vantus Leadership  
**Goal:** Clean transfer with minimal downtime and clear responsibilities

---

## Document Control

| Version | Date | Author | Changes |
|---------|------|--------|---------|
| 2.0.0 | 2026-02-09 | Vantus Systems | Removed owner-controlled systems terminology, simplified language |
| 1.0.0 | [[DATE]] | [[AUTHOR]] | Initial release |

| Role | Name | Signature | Date |

---

## 1. EXIT GOALS

- **Clean Transfer:** All assets transferred completely and securely
- **Minimal Downtime:** Zero or near-zero service interruption
- **Clear Responsibilities:** No ambiguity about who owns what
- **Knowledge Transfer:** Client team fully capable of independent operation
- **Future Flexibility:** Client can engage any vendor or build internal team

---

## 2. EXIT TRIGGERS

Common reasons for project conclusion and ownership transfer:

- [ ] Project completed successfully
- [ ] Contract term ended
- [ ] Client chooses to internalize operations
- [ ] Client chooses different vendor
- [ ] Business pivot or shutdown
- [ ] Mutual agreement to conclude

---

## 3. EXIT TIMELINE

### Phase 1: Preparation (Weeks E-4 to E-2)

| Week | Activities | Deliverables | Owner |
|------|------------|--------------|-------|
| E-4 | Documentation audit | Gap analysis report | Vantus |
| E-4 | Asset inventory | Complete asset list | Joint |
| E-3 | Access preparation | Transfer-ready accounts | Joint |
| E-3 | Training completion | Training records | Vantus |
| E-2 | Credential preparation | Clean credential inventory | Vantus |
| E-2 | Final documentation | Complete docs package | Vantus |

### Phase 2: Transfer (Week E-1 to E-0)

| Week | Activities | Deliverables | Owner |
|------|------------|--------------|-------|
| E-1 | Independence Drill | Drill completion report | Client |
| E-1 | Credential handover | Secure package delivered | Vantus |
| E-1 | Account transfers | Ownership confirmed | Joint |
| E-0 | Final sign-off | Ownership certificate | Joint |

### Phase 3: Post-Exit (Weeks E+1 to E+4)

| Week | Activities | Deliverables | Owner |
|------|------------|--------------|-------|
| E+1 to E+4 | Shadow Support | Observation-only support | Vantus |
| E+2 | Check-in call | Status review | Joint |
| E+4 | Final review | Project closure report | Vantus |

---

## 4. FINAL CHECKS

### 4.1 Ownership Verification

- [ ] All code repositories transferred to client ownership
- [ ] All cloud accounts billing transferred to client
- [ ] All domains under client registrar control
- [ ] All third-party services under client accounts
- [ ] All SSL certificates under client control
- [ ] All intellectual property rights transferred

### 4.2 Access Verification

- [ ] Client has root/admin access to all systems
- [ ] Client has owner access to all accounts
- [ ] All Vantus access keys removed
- [ ] All Vantus team members removed from accounts
- [ ] All passwords and credentials changed
- [ ] Emergency access procedures documented

### 4.3 Documentation Verification

- [ ] All documentation delivered and indexed
- [ ] Architecture documents complete
- [ ] Runbooks tested and verified
- [ ] API documentation current
- [ ] Training materials delivered
- [ ] FAQ updated with common issues

### 4.4 Backup Verification

- [ ] Latest production backup verified
- [ ] Backup restoration tested
- [ ] Backup encryption keys transferred
- [ ] Backup retention policy documented
- [ ] Disaster recovery plan tested

### 4.5 Support Handoff

- [ ] Support contacts updated
- [ ] Monitoring alerts redirected to client
- [ ] Incident response procedures reviewed
- [ ] Escalation paths documented
- [ ] 30-day shadow support scheduled

---

## 5. SUCCESS CRITERIA

The exit is considered successful when:

- [ ] Client can operate all systems without Vantus assistance
- [ ] All accounts and assets under client ownership
- [ ] All documentation delivered and understood
- [ ] No Vantus access remains (unless contractually agreed)
- [ ] Client team passes Independence Drill
- [ ] Final sign-off from both parties complete

---

## 6. POST-EXIT SUPPORT

### 6.1 Warranty Period

**Duration:** 30 days post-transfer  
**Scope:** Bug fixes for defects in delivered code  
**Exclusions:** New features, changes to requirements, client-caused issues

### 6.2 Shadow Support

**Duration:** 30 days post-transfer  
**Type:** Observation only - no direct intervention  
**Availability:** Business hours consultation  
**Escalation:** Emergency support for critical issues

### 6.3 Future Engagement

If client wishes to re-engage Vantus:
- New Statement of Work required
- Current system assessment
- Fresh contract terms
- No assumptions of prior access

---

## 7. SIGN-OFF

**This certifies that the exit has been completed successfully.**

**Client Confirmation:**
- [ ] All assets received
- [ ] All access verified
- [ ] All documentation received
- [ ] Team trained and capable
- [ ] No outstanding issues

**Vantus Confirmation:**
- [ ] All assets transferred
- [ ] All access removed
- [ ] All documentation delivered
- [ ] Training completed
- [ ] No outstanding obligations

**Client Representative:** _________________________________ Date: _______
